programme.title: AFLW: GF NMT v BRI
programme.desc: Competition powerhouses North Melbourne and Brisbane clash in the AFLW Grand Final for the third year in a row at Ikon Park.

programme.title: AFLW: GF NMT v BRI
programme.desc: Competition powerhouses North Melbourne and Brisbane clash in the AFLW Grand Final for the third year in a row at Ikon Park.

programme.title: 101 Places to Party Before You Die
programme.desc: The party heads outdoors as Adam and Jon attempt to conquer 4x4s, horseback riding and fly fishing. Not to mention the complicated liquor laws in Moab, Utah.

programme.title: 101 Places to Party Before You Die
programme.desc: The party heads outdoors as Adam and Jon attempt to conquer 4x4s, horseback riding and fly fishing. Not to mention the complicated liquor laws in Moab, Utah.

programme.title: 101 Places to Party Before You Die
101 Places to Party Before You Die
Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: Hugh Rowland returns to the winter roads with a grudge and a goal: run his previous employer out of town. For the first time in seven years, Hugh is a boss again.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: Hugh Rowland returns to the winter roads with a grudge and a goal: run his previous employer out of town. For the first time in seven years, Hugh is a boss again.

programme.title: Ice Cold Catch
programme.desc: Greg 'Vegas' Jones is gone. He lost his deckhand job on Iceland's Valdimar longliner for leaving the crew in the lurch just an hour before Captain Frosti was set to depart.

programme.title: Ice Cold Catch
programme.desc: Greg 'Vegas' Jones is gone. He lost his deckhand job on Iceland's Valdimar longliner for leaving the crew in the lurch just an hour before Captain Frosti was set to depart.

programme.title: Dirty Old Cars
programme.desc: In North Carolina, Jamie hopes to put a Honda CRX that's literally in pieces back together; in Georgia, Knoxy tries to flip a repulsive Ford Ranger that's more trouble than it's worth.

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Greg Davies does his best to pass judgement as Sophie Duker wets some tea bags and Bridget Christie gets lost in a small field.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor
programme.desc: Kristine McKee's new home is haunted by a poltergeist that gets physical with her son, and a friend's past life comes back to haunt Danielle Low with potentially life-threatening results.

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Bridget Christie shoves a cuddly toy inside a traffic cone to create a scene that almost reduces Little Alex Horne to tears.

programme.title: Ice Cold Catch
programme.desc: Texan Greenhorn Andrew Neystel, 29, begins the second of three trial weeks in the rough seas of Iceland, training to become a deckhand on the Valdimar, a 40-year-old longline cod fishing boat.

programme.title: Ice Cold Catch
programme.desc: Texan Greenhorn Andrew Neystel, 29, begins the second of three trial weeks in the rough seas of Iceland, training to become a deckhand on the Valdimar, a 40-year-old longline cod fishing boat.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: VP Express finally deliver their first loads of the season, but after a heated confrontation with owners Hugh Rowland and Vlad Pleskot, new hire Art Burke falls behind the bosses on the way back home.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Steve Grahame hits the mud with a broken down body and high voltage headaches. For Cameron Smith the long road west gets a whole lot hotter and a whole lot harder.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Steve Grahame hits the mud with a broken down body and high voltage headaches. For Cameron Smith the long road west gets a whole lot hotter and a whole lot harder.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Nick and Jo Atkins battle the Gibb River Road to meet a deadline. Yogi crosses the Nullabor juggling an 'ugly load' and anxious customers. Slick rushes to deliver a house across the Timor Sea to a remote community.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Nick and Jo Atkins battle the Gibb River Road to meet a deadline. Yogi crosses the Nullabor juggling an 'ugly load' and anxious customers. Slick rushes to deliver a house across the Timor Sea to a remote community.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Chum steps up to the plate when a seller pitches him a signed photo of Cy Young. Will he hit a home run, or strike out?

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Chum steps up to the plate when a seller pitches him a signed photo of Cy Young. Will he hit a home run, or strike out?

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: It's a bird! It's a plane! It's Superman pyjamas! Can Rick and Chum make a deal for the Man of Steel before the seller flies away?

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: It's a bird! It's a plane! It's Superman pyjamas! Can Rick and Chum make a deal for the Man of Steel before the seller flies away?

programme.title: DMV
programme.desc: When Ceci says Colette's kindness is for show, Colette secretly gives Noa the perfect gift to prove her heart's in the right place.

programme.title: DMV
programme.desc: When Ceci says Colette's kindness is for show, Colette secretly gives Noa the perfect gift to prove her heart's in the right place.

programme.title: DMV
programme.desc: When Colette learns Noa is seeing someone, Ceci urges her to use a little magic to win him back. Meanwhile, Barb hunts for the culprit behind rude DMV graffiti.

programme.title: DMV
programme.desc: When Colette learns Noa is seeing someone, Ceci urges her to use a little magic to win him back. Meanwhile, Barb hunts for the culprit behind rude DMV graffiti.

programme.title: Dirty Old Cars
programme.desc: In Minnesota, a customer wants his crusty Cabriolet transformed into a roadworthy vehicle he can take cross-country with his dad.

programme.title: Dirty Old Cars
programme.desc: In Minnesota, a customer wants his crusty Cabriolet transformed into a roadworthy vehicle he can take cross-country with his dad.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Steve Grahame hits the mud with a broken down body and high voltage headaches. For Cameron Smith the long road west gets a whole lot hotter and a whole lot harder.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: VP Express finally deliver their first loads of the season, but after a heated confrontation with owners Hugh Rowland and Vlad Pleskot, new hire Art Burke falls behind the bosses on the way back home.

programme.title: Outback Crystal Hunters
programme.desc: Five crystal-hunting teams set out to confront the extreme conditions of the Australian Outback, hoping to unearth some of the world's rarest and most breathtaking crystals.

programme.title: Outback Crystal Hunters
programme.desc: Five crystal-hunting teams set out to confront the extreme conditions of the Australian Outback, hoping to unearth some of the world's rarest and most breathtaking crystals.

programme.title: Live: Abu Dhabi T10: Day 11
programme.desc: The 10-over format gets underway in UAE with Marcus Stonis, Tim David and more competing for this year's T10 title.

programme.desc: The 10-over format gets underway in UAE with Marcus Stonis, Tim David and more competing for this year's T10 title.

programme.title: Ashes: 2002/03 1st Test
programme.desc: The 2002/03 features an Australian outfit in their prime. A relentless bowling attack from Glenn McGrath and Jason Gillespie, a stunning MCG Test double century for Justin Langer, and finally, an Australian legend gets his "Perfect Day."

programme.title: Ashes: 2017/18 1st Test
programme.desc: The 2017/18 Ashes saw Australian captain Steve Smith shine at the Gabba and Perth, while future captain Pat Cummins made a statement in his first Ashes series. England's Alastair Cook delivers a double century in his final Ashes series.

programme.title: PM XI v ENG: Day 1
programme.desc: Australia's Prime Minister's XI face England's XI in a two-day pink-ball tour match in Canberra.

programme.title: Golf: PGA Championship Mini: Final Round

programme.title: The 'Burbs
programme.desc: Suburbanite Ray Peterson's plan for a peaceful vacation is disturbed by a creepy new family on the block in this outrageous suspense-comedy directed by Joe Dante.

programme.title: Casino
programme.desc: Greed, deception, money and murder envelop two mobsters and a devious trophy wife running a Las Vegas casino.

programme.title: Legends of the Fall
programme.desc: When the sons of a cavalry colonel set out to fight a war in Europe, suspicion and jealousy threaten to tear apart their once indestructible bond when the sexy Susanna enters their lives.

programme.title: Clueless
programme.desc: So you think you don't have a clue? Join the club, as high-schoolers Cher and Dionne's plan to transform a lonely misfit into a total babe backfires in the worst possible way.

programme.title: Twister
programme.desc: Thrill-seeking meteorologists are chasing the most destructive tornado in 50 years.

programme.title: Top Gun
programme.desc: A pilot is selected to attend the Top Gun Naval Flying School while also pursuing a relationship with an instructor.

programme.title: Gogglebox UK
programme.desc: The Goggleboxers review Jamie Oliver's Jamie: Keep Cooking and Carry On, Celebrity Murder Mystery, The Andrew Marr Show with Joe Wicks, and This Morning with dog yoga.

programme.title: Gogglebox UK
programme.desc: The Goggleboxers review Tiger King: Murder, Mayhem and Madness, BBC News on the prime minister in hospital, An Address by Her Majesty the Queen, and Keeping Up with the Kardashians.

programme.title: Saved & Remade
programme.desc: Woodworker Radha finds a precious doll house harder to handle than he first thought. Seamstress Velvet gives a 63-year-old teddy bear a new life.

programme.title: Selling Houses Australia
programme.desc: Single mum Crissy's home is classed only as a shed, making it impossible for prospective buyers to get finance. With three young children and a chronic illness, she desperately needs help.

programme.title: Celebrity Sewing Bee Festive Specials
programme.desc: Sara Pascoe celebrates the new year by inviting Drag Race winner Lawrence Chaney, comedian Rose Matafeo, singer Claire Richards from Steps and journalist Kirsty Wark to try their hand at creating party clothes.

programme.title: The Great Pottery Throw Down
programme.desc: It's the semi-final and the remaining potters face the infamous toilet challenge and are tested on their intricate brushwork by Duchess China guest judge, Lee Price.

programme.title: Alison Hammond's Florida Unpacked
programme.desc: Former tour rep Alison and son Aidan head to Florida seeking family adventure in true American style. Can they embrace the Sunshine State without blowing their budget?

programme.title: Inside The Four Seasons
programme.desc: Michelin-starred chef Yannick Alleno visits Pavyllon as staff strive for perfection, sealing deals and unveiling the secrets of the hotel's exclusive wine cellar.

programme.title: Phil Spencer: New Zealand's Best Homes
programme.desc: Phil Spencer explores some of New Zealand's most stunning and desirable homes - from luxury mountain retreats to urban architectural wonders.

programme.title: Christmas At Stately Home
programme.desc: Almost half of Blenheim's preservation and restoration bill is covered by Christmas takings. So for the palace's army of staff and specialist teams, the pressure is on to make the event triumph.

programme.title: Grand Designs Australia
programme.desc: Georgina and Philip are building high with sweeping views across the entire bay. But in what becomes the longest delay ever witnessed on the series, can they muster the financial and emotional will to keep going?

programme.title: Love It Or List It Australia
programme.desc: Fiona & Alex, paramedics who met in training, clash over staying or moving. She wants comfort, he wants change. Neale updates their home while Andrew looks for their next one.

programme.title: Selling Houses Australia
programme.desc: The difficulty of selling a cluttered home is one that every real estate agent can relate to. Over the years Andrew has encountered many cluttered homes but this one might just take the trophy.

programme.title: Selling Houses Australia
programme.desc: Margarita's art deco home is a fish out of water. Nestled amid an industrial suburb, it's hardly your standard offering. The style is quirky, the floor plan is crazy and the decor is plain outlandish.

programme.title: Luxury Escapes: World's Best Holidays
programme.desc: Pia Miranda and Mike Reid explore Iceland's waterfalls, whales, and lagoons before London glamour at The Shard with fine dining above the city.

programme.title: Love Your Garden
programme.desc: Alan and the team are transforming the outside space of firefighter Rebecca, whose small garden needs to accommodate her gym equipment, a vegetable patch and play area for her six-year-old twins.

programme.title: Amanda & Alan's Spanish Job
programme.desc: Amanda and Alan face their biggest challenge yet: the courtyard. With a crumbling outbuilding and an overgrown vine, Alan struggles to see the potential.

programme.title: Long Lost Family
programme.desc: Sara Hathaway, grieving her adoptive family, searches for her birth family. Diane Kerridge seeks the son she gave up as a teenager, hoping to end years of longing.

programme.title: Selling Houses Australia
programme.desc: The difficulty of selling a cluttered home is one that every real estate agent can relate to. Over the years Andrew has encountered many cluttered homes but this one might just take the trophy.

programme.title: Love It Or List It Australia
programme.desc: Fiona & Alex, paramedics who met in training, clash over staying or moving. She wants comfort, he wants change. Neale updates their home while Andrew looks for their next one.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: Ann and Steve are called to see a woman with breathing difficulties only to discover she is having a major heart attack. Stuart and Craig go to the home of a busy mum who may be having an allergic reaction.

programme.title: 24 Hours in Emergency
programme.desc: Gus, 49, falls off a ladder; Daisy, 19, vomits blood after a recent tonsillectomy; Leonard, 93, is sent to resus after falling down stairs.

programme.title: Helicopter ER
programme.desc: Helicopter rescues by the Yorkshire Air Ambulance.

programme.title: Who Will Love My Doggy?
programme.desc: This series has a simple mission - to find loving new homes for dogs whose previous owners can no longer care for them.

programme.title: The Bourne Ultimatum
programme.desc: Jason Bourne is racing to solve the mystery of his past while being hunted by the very organisation that hired him.

programme.title: Jesse Stone: Thin Ice
programme.desc: A police chief (Tom Selleck) lands in trouble with the town council after a shootout on the streets of Boston.

programme.title: Nymphomaniac: Vol 2
programme.desc: Continues with the story of self-diagnosed nymphomaniac Joe exploring her adulthood, during which her journey of self-discovery leads to darker complications.

programme.title: A Sweet Christmas Romance
programme.desc: When a food stylist finds out the owner of her favorite bakery is retiring and sponsoring a baking contest to see who will be her successor, she enters but then is forced to join forces with a rival chef.

programme.title: Rise of the Guardians
programme.desc: When the evil spirit Pitch launches an assault on Earth, the immortal Guardians must join forces for the first time to protect the hopes, beliefs and imagination of children all over the world.

programme.title: Rise of the Guardians
programme.desc: When the evil spirit Pitch launches an assault on Earth, the immortal Guardians must join forces for the first time to protect the hopes, beliefs and imagination of children all over the world.

programme.title: Trading Places
programme.desc: A story of a down-and-out con artist who trades lifestyles with a well-to-do investor. Two wealthy power players set the wheels turning with a crazy bet and the comedy gets richer by the minute.

programme.title: Trading Places
programme.desc: A story of a down-and-out con artist who trades lifestyles with a well-to-do investor. Two wealthy power players set the wheels turning with a crazy bet and the comedy gets richer by the minute.

programme.title: Santa's Boots
programme.desc: Forced to take a holiday from her job in Seattle, Holly returns to her hometown, where she reluctantly agrees to become Santa's new elf at her dad's local department store.

programme.title: Santa's Boots
programme.desc: Forced to take a holiday from her job in Seattle, Holly returns to her hometown, where she reluctantly agrees to become Santa's new elf at her dad's local department store.

programme.title: World War Z
programme.desc: The story revolves around UN employee Gerry Lane, who travels the world in a race against time to stop a pandemic that is toppling armies and governments and threatening to decimate humanity itself.

programme.title: The Mummy (2017)
programme.desc: Thought safely entombed beneath the unforgiving desert, an ancient princess, whose destiny was unjustly taken from her, is awakened, bringing terrors that defy human comprehension.

programme.title: Robin Hood
programme.desc: After years of fighting in the Crusades, Robin of Loxley returns to find his estate destroyed and his neighbours impoverished, all thanks to the Sheriff of Nottingham.

programme.title: The Great Wall
programme.desc: A group of European mercenaries become embroiled in the defense of the Great Wall of China in this epic adventure.

programme.title: Geostorm
programme.desc: A system of satellites designed to protect the earth from natural disasters starts to malfunction, but who is responsible and can it be stopped?

programme.title: The Time Traveler's Wife
programme.desc: After meeting her soulmate at age six, Clare laments a linear lifetime defined by waiting for Henry's unpredictable appearances.

programme.title: The Time Traveler's Wife
programme.desc: Clare hosts a couples' dinner party to introduce Henry to her roommate Charisse and best friend Gomez, but when it's crashed by another Henry and his girlfriend Ingrid, deeply held secrets are revealed.

programme.title: The Time Traveler's Wife
programme.desc: Clare hosts a couples' dinner party to introduce Henry to her roommate Charisse and best friend Gomez, but when it's crashed by another Henry and his girlfriend Ingrid, deeply held secrets are revealed.

programme.title: Murder in Boston
programme.desc: When evidence against the first suspect collapses, Boston Police again target Black neighbourhoods, turning to William Bennett, a man with a long record.

programme.title: Murder in Boston
programme.desc: When evidence against the first suspect collapses, Boston Police again target Black neighbourhoods, turning to William Bennett, a man with a long record.

programme.title: El Accidente
programme.desc: Life seems to be getting back to normal until Jose receives a secret live stream of his wife.

programme.title: El Accidente
programme.desc: Life seems to be getting back to normal until Jose receives a secret live stream of his wife.

programme.title: Music's Greatest Mysteries
programme.desc: What's the satanic truth behind playing records backwards? Does Aerosmith have nine lives? Was Elvis secretly a narc for the Nixon administration?

programme.title: Music's Greatest Mysteries
programme.desc: What's the satanic truth behind playing records backwards? Does Aerosmith have nine lives? Was Elvis secretly a narc for the Nixon administration?

programme.title: Music's Greatest Mysteries
programme.desc: Were the rights to Friends in Low Places sold to settle a bar tab? Was Sweet Home Alabama the first diss track? What explains the mysteries that surround Stevie Nicks?

programme.title: Music's Greatest Mysteries
programme.desc: Were the rights to Friends in Low Places sold to settle a bar tab? Was Sweet Home Alabama the first diss track? What explains the mysteries that surround Stevie Nicks?

programme.title: All Her Fault
programme.desc: Marissa learns the dark truth about Carrie's past and faces an impossible choice to protect her family.

programme.title: The Brokenwood Mysteries
programme.desc: Mike and his team are thrust into a world of antiquities when a TV crew from the hit series All Things Old and Beautiful arrives in town and one of the hosts is murdered.

programme.title: Devil In Disguise: John Wayne Gacy
programme.desc: Chicago-area contractor John Wayne Gacy leads a double-life as a serial killer, while detectives piece together clues that lead to a shocking discovery.

programme.title: Devil In Disguise: John Wayne Gacy
programme.desc: Chicago-area contractor John Wayne Gacy leads a double-life as a serial killer, while detectives piece together clues that lead to a shocking discovery.

programme.title: Devil In Disguise: John Wayne Gacy

programme.title: Devil In Disguise: John Wayne Gacy
programme.desc: Chicago-area contractor John Wayne Gacy leads a double-life as a serial killer, while detectives piece together clues that lead to a shocking discovery.

The Brokenwood Mysteries
programme.desc: Mike and his team are thrust into a world of antiquities when a TV crew from the hit series All Things Old and Beautiful arrives in town and one of the hosts is murdered.

programme.title: The Brokenwood Mysteries
programme.desc: Mike and his team are thrust into a world of antiquities when a TV crew from the hit series All Things Old and Beautiful arrives in town and one of the hosts is murdered.

programme.title: The Brokenwood Mysteries
programme.desc: The Brokenwood Health Retreat proves rather unhealthy for one unfortunate visitor, leaving Mike and the team with a very tricky case to solve.

programme.title: The Brokenwood Mysteries
programme.desc: Mike and his team are thrust into a world of antiquities when a TV crew from the hit series All Things Old and Beautiful arrives in town and one of the hosts is murdered.

programme.title: Murder, She Baked: Just Desserts
programme.desc: Hannah appears on TV as a guest on a televised bake-off, but someone on the show is found murdered, so Hannah helps her detective boyfriend find the killer.

programme.title: Pleasantville
programme.desc: Two modern American teenagers are sucked into their television set and end up living in a black-and-white '50s sitcom.

programme.title: Pleasantville
programme.desc: Two modern American teenagers are sucked into their television set and end up living in a black-and-white '50s sitcom.

programme.title: Bridget Jones: Mad About the Boy
Bridget Jones: Mad About the Boy
The Road to El Dorado
programme.desc: Get ready for an exhilarating ride of a lifetime! Join Tulio and Miguel and their hilarious horse Altivo as they set sail, map in hand, in search of golden treasure in the all-star adventure, The Road to El Dorado! Upon landing on the shores of El Dorado, the legendary Lost City of Gold, Tulio and Miguel are mistaken for gods and are lavished with riches beyond their wildest dreams! As friendship, loyalty, and greed collide, our unlikely heroes must make the decision of their lives: run off with the gold or face unforeseen dangers to save the people of El Dorado.

programme.title: The Road to El Dorado
programme.desc: Get ready for an exhilarating ride of a lifetime! Join Tulio and Miguel and their hilarious horse Altivo as they set sail, map in hand, in search of golden treasure.

programme.title: Smurfs: The Lost Village
programme.desc: A mysterious map sets Smurfette, and her best friends Brainy, Clumsy and Hefty, on an exciting and thrilling race through the Forbidden Forest, filled with magical creatures, to find a mysterious lost village before the evil wizard Gargamel does. Embarking on a roller-coaster journey full of action and danger, the Smurfs are on a course that leads to the discovery of the biggest secret in Smurf history.

programme.title: Smurfs: The Lost Village
programme.desc: A mysterious map sets Smurfette, and her best friends Brainy, Clumsy and Hefty, on an exciting and thrilling race through the Forbidden Forest, filled with magical creatures, to find a mysterious lost village before the evil wizard Gargamel does. Embarking on a roller-coaster journey full of action and danger, the Smurfs are on a course that leads to the discovery of the biggest secret in Smurf history.

programme.title: Peter Rabbit
programme.desc: Peter Rabbit, the mischievous and adventurous hero who has captivated generations of readers, now takes on the starring role of his own cute, contemporary comedy with attitude. In the film, Peter's feud with Mr. McGregor escalates to greater heights than ever before as they rival for the affections of the warm-hearted animal lover who lives next door.

programme.title: Peter Rabbit
programme.desc: Peter Rabbit, the mischievous and adventurous hero who has captivated generations of readers, now takes on the starring role of his own cute, contemporary comedy with attitude. In the film, Peter's feud with Mr. McGregor escalates to greater heights than ever before as they rival for the affections of the warm-hearted animal lover who lives next door.

programme.title: Hook
programme.desc: A lawyer who has lost any memory that he was once the legendary Peter Pan must travel to Neverland, aided by Tinker Bell, to rescue his children from his nemesis, Captain Hook.

programme.title: Hook
programme.desc: A lawyer who has lost any memory that he was once the legendary Peter Pan must travel to Neverland, aided by Tinker Bell, to rescue his children from his nemesis, Captain Hook.

programme.title: Sing
programme.desc: Buster Moon is a dapper koala who presides over a once grand theatre that has fallen on hard times. Buster is an eternal optimist, and maybe a bit of a scoundrel, who loves his theatre above all and will do anything to preserve it. Now facing the crumbling of his life's ambition, he has one final chance to restore his fading jewel to its former glory by producing the world's greatest singing competition.

programme.title: Sing
programme.desc: Buster Moon is a dapper koala who presides over a once grand theatre that has fallen on hard times. Buster is an eternal optimist, and maybe a bit of a scoundrel, who loves his theatre above all and will do anything to preserve it. Now facing the crumbling of his life's ambition, he has one final chance to restore his fading jewel to its former glory by producing the world's greatest singing competition.

programme.title: Dog Man
programme.desc: Dog Man, part dog, part man, is on a mission to protect and serve while chasing down the feline supervillain, Petey the Cat.

programme.title: Dog Man
programme.desc: Dog Man, part dog, part man, is on a mission to protect and serve while chasing down the feline supervillain, Petey the Cat.

programme.title: Harold and the Purple Crayon
programme.desc: Inside of his book, adventurous Harold can make anything come to life simply by drawing it. After he grows up and draws himself off the book's pages and into the physical world, Harold finds he has a lot to learn about real life.

programme.title: Harold and the Purple Crayon
programme.desc: Harold can bring anything in his book to life by drawing it. When he grows up and steps out of the book and into the real world, he realises he has much to learn.

programme.title: The Prince of Egypt
programme.desc: This is the extraordinary tale of two brothers, one born of royal blood, one an orphan with a secret past. Their final confrontation will forever change their lives - and the world.

programme.title: The Prince of Egypt
programme.desc: This is the extraordinary tale of two brothers, one born of royal blood, one an orphan with a secret past. Their final confrontation will forever change their lives - and the world.

programme.title: The Munsters
programme.desc: From Rob Zombie comes the strangest love story ever told as Herman and Lily's crazy courtship takes The Munsters on a hauntingly hilarious trip from Transylvania to Hollywood.

programme.title: The Munsters
programme.desc: From Rob Zombie comes the strangest love story ever told as Herman and Lily's crazy courtship takes The Munsters on a hauntingly hilarious trip from Transylvania to Hollywood.

programme.title: How the Grinch Stole Christmas
programme.desc: He's mean and green and he hates the yo-ho-hoing. The Grinch conspires to steal Christmas from Whoville, making off with the presents, decorations, trees and every other joyful thing.

programme.title: How the Grinch Stole Christmas
programme.desc: He's mean and green and he hates the yo-ho-hoing. The Grinch conspires to steal Christmas from Whoville, making off with the presents, decorations, trees and every other joyful thing.

programme.title: Detective Pikachu
programme.desc: The world of Pokemon comes to life! The story begins when ace detective Harry Goodman goes mysteriously missing, prompting his 21-year-old son Tim to find out what happened. Aiding in the investigation is Harry's former Pokemon partner, Detective Pikachu: a hilariously wise-cracking, adorable super-sleuth who is a puzzlement even to himself. Finding that they are uniquely equipped to communicate with one another, Tim and Pikachu join forces on a thrilling adventure to unravel the tangled mystery. Chasing clues together through the neon-lit streets of Ryme City - a sprawling, modern metropolis where humans and Pokemon live side by side in a hyper-realistic live-action world - they encounter a diverse cast of Pokemon characters and uncover a shocking plot that could destroy this peaceful co-existence and threaten the whole Pokemon universe.

programme.title: Detective Pikachu
programme.desc: The world of Pokemon comes to life! The story begins when ace detective Harry Goodman goes mysteriously missing, prompting his 21-year-old son Tim to find out what happened. Aiding in the investigation is Harry's former Pokemon partner, Detective Pikachu: a hilariously wise-cracking, adorable super-sleuth who is a puzzlement even to himself. Finding that they are uniquely equipped to communicate with one another, Tim and Pikachu join forces on a thrilling adventure to unravel the tangled mystery. Chasing clues together through the neon-lit streets of Ryme City - a sprawling, modern metropolis where humans and Pokemon live side by side in a hyper-realistic live-action world - they encounter a diverse cast of Pokemon characters and uncover a shocking plot that could destroy this peaceful co-existence and threaten the whole Pokemon universe.

programme.title: Puss in Boots
programme.desc: After Puss in Boots was blamed for a bank robbery in San Ricardo, engineered against his wishes by Humpty Dumpty, Puss leaves Humpty to his fate. Now reunited, they try to trust each other again.

programme.title: Puss in Boots
programme.desc: Before he met the ogre Shrek, Puss in Boots (voice of Antonio Banderas) had a complicated life in which he was smeared with the blame of a bank robbery in San Ricardo, engineered against Puss' wishes by Humpty Dumpty (Zach Galifianakis), who was captured while trying to escape - thanks to Puss leaving him to his fate in anger. The two lifelong friends break up and it isn't until they re-unite that they trust each other again.

programme.title: Matilda
programme.desc: A wonderful little girl who happens to be a genius, along with her understanding teacher, outwit the worst parents and the worst school principal imaginable.

programme.title: Matilda
programme.desc: A wonderful little girl who happens to be a genius, along with her understanding teacher, outwit the worst parents and the worst school principal imaginable.

programme.title: The Secret Garden (2020)
programme.desc: When Mary Lennox's parents suddenly die, she is sent to live with her uncle, Archibald Craven, on his remote country estate deep in the Yorkshire moors. While exploring, she discovers a hidden magical garden.

programme.title: The Secret Garden (2020)
programme.desc: When Mary Lennox's parents suddenly die, she is sent to live with her uncle, Archibald Craven, on his remote country estate deep in the Yorkshire moors. While exploring, she discovers a hidden magical garden.

programme.title: The Making of Gladiator II
programme.desc: A special look at the making of Gladiator II, featuring unprecedented access encompassing all aspects of production, from the grand scope of the set to characters, combat, costumes, scoring and more.

programme.title: The Making of Gladiator II
programme.desc: A special look at the making of Gladiator II, featuring unprecedented access encompassing all aspects of production, from the grand scope of the set to characters, combat, costumes, scoring and more.

programme.title: Dune: Part Two
programme.desc: Paul unites with Chani and the Fremen to seek revenge. Facing a choice between the love of his life and the fate of the universe, he must prevent a terrible future only he can foresee.

programme.title: Dune: Part Two
programme.desc: Paul unites with Chani and the Fremen to seek revenge. Facing a choice between the love of his life and the fate of the universe, he must prevent a terrible future only he can foresee.

programme.title: Boy
programme.desc: A hoodlum father comes home to his son, who had created an elaborate myth around his dad's disappearance.

programme.title: Boy
programme.desc: A hoodlum father comes home to his son, who had created an elaborate myth around his dad's disappearance.

programme.title: Sex Tape
programme.desc: When they make a three-hour sex tape to spice up their love life, a husband and wife realise they're in trouble when the epic recording threatens to go viral! A delightfully crude comedy.

programme.title: National Security
programme.desc: Everyone wants them dead, but they might just kill each other first. Two police academy rejects are at each other's throats and on the case of a smuggler with friends in high places.

programme.title: National Security
programme.desc: Everyone wants them dead, but they might just kill each other first. Two police academy rejects are at each other's throats and on the case of a smuggler with friends in high places.

programme.title: American Pie
programme.desc: Four unlucky in love friends who make a pact: lose their virginity by prom night. Manipulating their way into the hearts of some of their classmates, their plans often backfire with hilarity.

programme.title: Anchorman: The Legend of Ron Burgundy
programme.desc: When Ron Burgundy is told he will be working with a young, ambitious newswoman, it turns to war.

programme.title: Anchorman: The Legend of Ron Burgundy
programme.desc: When Ron Burgundy is told he will be working with a young, ambitious newswoman, it turns to war.

programme.title: The War With Grandpa
programme.desc: When grandfather Ed moves in, Peter is forced to give up his bedroom. Unwilling to tolerate this injustice, Peter devises a series of pranks to drive him out.

programme.title: Galaxy Quest
programme.desc: The alumni cast of a cult space TV show have to play their roles as the real thing when an alien race needs their help.

programme.title: American Pie
programme.desc: Four unlucky in love friends who make a pact: lose their virginity by prom night. Manipulating their way into the hearts of some of their classmates, their plans often backfire with hilarity.

programme.title: American Pie
programme.desc: Four unlucky in love friends who make a pact: lose their virginity by prom night. Manipulating their way into the hearts of some of their classmates, their plans often backfire with hilarity.
